content.method: National census of specialist positions (filled/vacant) cross-referenced with expert-committee waiting-list data and prescribed-vs-delivered service hour audits at a representative sample of schools; combine with advocacy-sourced hidden-population estimates validated against school-health screening pilot data in underserved counties.
content.question: What is the actual specialist-teacher-to-SNI-pupil ratio by district and county, how large is the unmet/undiagnosed ('hidden') SEN population, and what magnitude of unmet prescribed habilitation/therapy hours exists by school type and region?
content.why_it_matters: Workforce-expansion (T5) and finance-redesign (T4) proposals cannot be sized or targeted without knowing where and how large capacity gaps are; this also determines whether observed identification rates understate true need, which changes the interpretation of all growth-decomposition findings.
